language.heading: Language
language.label: Display language
language.hint: Sets the dashboard language. More languages are on the way.

update.label: Updates
update.instructions: Run this on the host to upgrade. VAC pulls the new images and recreates its own containers — your apps keep running.

channel.label: Update channel
channel.hint: Switching channels is not available yet.

autoUpdate.label: Auto update
autoUpdate.hint: Pull and self-update during the maintenance window (Sun 04:00 UTC).

maintenance.heading: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Reclaim disk space taken by leftover Docker images and build cache. Safe — the images your running apps use are kept; only orphaned layers are removed.
maintenance.note: VAC also prunes old images automatically every night.

dialog.copyHint: Copy this token now — it won't be shown again.

deployments.heading: Deployments
deployments.hint: How many app deploys run at the same time when several are queued (e.g. a burst of pushes). Different apps only — VAC never runs two deploys for the <0>same</0> app at once. Higher values finish a backlog faster but use more CPU, RAM, and disk I/O during builds; keep it low on a small VPS. Allowed range {{min}}–{{max}}. Takes effect after the next control-plane restart.

toast.saved: Deploy concurrency saved — applies after the next restart

totp.heading: Two-factor authentication
totp.hint: Require a time-based code in addition to your password.

enableFlow.recoveryHint: Store these somewhere safe. Each code can be used once if you lose your device.

restart.title: Restart control plane
restart.description: Restarts vac-api and vac-proxy. Apps keep running.
restart.confirmDescription: vac-api and vac-proxy will restart. The dashboard will briefly disconnect and reconnect. Running apps are unaffected.

stopAll.title: Stop all applications
stopAll.description: Stops every container managed by VAC.
stopAll.confirmDescription: Every VAC-managed app stack will be stopped. They can be started again individually. The control plane keeps running.

reset.title: Reset instance
reset.description: Wipes apps, deployments, and databases. Requires typed confirmation.
reset.confirmDescription: This permanently removes every app, its deployments, and its data volumes. This cannot be undone. Type <0>{{phrase}}</0> to confirm.

dnsRecord.name: Name
dnsRecord.registrarHint: Using Namecheap, GoDaddy or Cloudflare? Their Name/Host field is relative to your domain — enter <0>{{relative}}</0>, not the full name (they append your domain automatically).

base.heading: Base domain
base.intro: Apps get an automatic subdomain under this domain (e.g. <0>my-app.{{example}}</0>). Leave blank to disable automatic subdomains.
base.none: No base domain configured — apps get no automatic subdomain.
base.inheritHint: Leave blank to keep inheriting from {{origin}}; type a value to override it here.

confirm.title: Change the base domain?
confirm.body_one: {{count}} app will move their automatic subdomain from <0>*.{{from}}</0> to <0>*.{{to}}</0>. The old URLs stop working immediately.
confirm.body_other: {{count}} apps will move their automatic subdomain from <0>*.{{from}}</0> to <0>*.{{to}}</0>. The old URLs stop working immediately.
confirm.clearWarning: Clearing the base domain stops every app’s automatic subdomain from resolving. Custom domains are unaffected.

toast.saved: Base domain saved — routes are reconciling

add.heading: Add a domain
add.hint: You can add a domain now and assign it to a service later — it’ll verify DNS either way.

list.heading: Domains
list.autoTitle: Managed automatically — change the slug or base domain
list.deleteConfirm: Delete {{hostname}}? Its route is removed immediately.

config.createRecord: Create this record at your DNS provider so <0>{{hostname}}</0> points at this VPS.
config.apexNote: An apex domain must use an A record (a CNAME at the apex is invalid).
config.propagation: DNS changes can take up to your record’s TTL to show here. HTTPS is issued automatically within ~60s once DNS resolves to this server.

edit.title: Edit domain
edit.description: Re-point this domain to another service or app, or rename it. Routing swaps in place.
edit.redirectHint: Send all traffic for this host to another domain with a permanent (308) redirect — e.g. point <0>www.example.com</0> at <0>example.com</0>. The redirect target becomes the primary domain. Leave blank to serve the app directly.

wildcard.intro: Want every app to get an automatic subdomain? Add a wildcard <0>*.{{baseDomain}}</0> record pointing at this VPS.
wildcard.ok: Wildcard DNS configured — every app gets an automatic subdomain.
wildcard.notResolving: Not resolving here yet — add the record above and recheck
